release_notes: Crew Utilization unavailabilities are now hour-accurate (Option Y): the bulk SmartStaff endpoint preserves partial-day periods that the previous date-only scrape collapsed to whole days or dropped entirely. Forecast and unavailability disk caches removed in favour of sub-second live reads via the bulk endpoints. Auto-refresh background thread retired. Header indicator renamed 'Roster' to clarify it now refers only to the crew roster cache.
